input.code:
const response = await fetch(url);
const data = response.json();

expected_output.issue_summary: response might be undefined or error handling is missing
expected_output.analysis: fetch() doesn't reject on HTTP errors, must check response.ok
expected_output.explanation: fetch() resolves even on 404/500. Always check response.ok and await json().
expected_output.prevention: Use try/catch for error handling and always validate API responses

input.code:
const items = await getItems();
return items.map(item => item.name);

expected_output.analysis: API response might not include expected structure
expected_output.explanation: Always validate array type before calling .map()
expected_output.prevention: Add type guards and defensive checks for external data

input.problem: Component re-renders on every parent update
input.context: Child component receiving props from parent

expected_output.explanation: React.memo prevents re-renders when props haven't changed
expected_output.prevention: Use memo for components passed simple props, useCallback for functions

input.error: Type 'string | undefined' is not assignable to type 'string'

expected_output.prevention: Use strict TypeScript settings, handle optional values explicitly
